reviews.text:
If you want to feel like the Goddess you are and truly be seen through the eyes of the best hype woman, Gabby is the best to take you through a transformational photo shoot! Before working with her, my biggest fears were the potential discomfort of the session and simply not liking the end results. I was coming from a place of not feeling confident or sexy in my own skin, following a difficult ending to a previous relationship where I felt my worth was only tied to my weight.

Those nerves definitely existed, but they didn't come true! Instead, the experience was great and I absolutely LOVE my pictures. Gabby’s vibe is so welcoming and positive; she really took the time to understand where I was and what I wanted out of the experience. She made me feel comfortable and seen in a way I haven't before.

The actual session felt like being seen by someone who recognized my inner and outer beauty and translated that through her art. All of the sets were beautiful, but I especially loved the neon set—I truly felt like a moon goddess! Now, when I look at the final photos, I see myself as a beautiful being and get to take home a beautiful book of art that embodies that beauty for years to come

10/10—I really can’t wait to share this opportunity with others! Gabby helped me bring my vision to life and bring out my strength through authentic expression, coaching me through discomfort and helping me remember exactly what I wanted to achieve with these photos.

My biggest fear going in was that this was not going to materialize as a good brand kit, or that I would still look uncomfortable on camera. What happened instead was that Gabby helped me produce iconic fine art that embodies the true essence of my brand—subversion of the patriarchy and embodied comfort, calm, and confidence for women in corporate America.

I loved all of the amazing attention to detail—the preparation for the day, the schedule, the upfront communication, and even having a makeup artist there to take a load off of the preparation experience. Gabby is wonderful to work with and takes time to really understand your vision and needs.

The final photos are works of fine art I’d love to show in a centerfold in Forbes, Vanity Fair, or in a museum. They represent power, luxury, and calm confidence. Any person desiring boudoir photography would significantly benefit from this experience!

I am so incredibly over the moon. The experience was one I will never forget. Gabby is such a joy, and her energy is just fantastic. She exuded such trustworthy, fun vibes. I saw myself as 100% beautiful for the first time in my life, and I truly believe that this experience helped my body image more than anything ever has. I feel like I did a 180.

Also, my now-husband loved it ;)

My experience with Gabby was nothing short of powerful. From our first phone call, I knew this wasn’t just a photoshoot—it was an intentional, deeply personal process. Gabby took the time to truly know me, not just how I wanted to look, but who I am and what I wanted to feel.

Her energy alone made me feel safe, comfortable, and celebrated. Every step of the experience was about honoring me in a way that felt authentic and empowering. She has a way of seeing you—really seeing you—and reflecting that back through her work.

Of course, the photos are absolutely beautiful. But what stayed with me most was how I felt when I left: inspired, fulfilled, and connected to myself in a way I can’t fully put into words. I walked in as a mom, a caregiver, a partner, a burlesque performer—and I walked out feeling desired, confident, and fully embodied

After my suicide attempt in 2021, I lost my power and my voice. This shoot was about reclaiming that and fully embracing who I am and where I am today. My biggest fear was not being present and not taking full advantage of the self love day. I instead, fully embraced the day and stepped into my power. I see myself in a whole new light. It made me emotional to see myself reclaim my body. I love the laughter and comfortability. I was totally at ease. Gabby cheered me on! I totally felt pampered and like I was the center of attention. 10/10 no notes! Girl, get your ass to Gabby, it'll change your life!
